description: Reason Ready Objects — the Fjall-native RAG + intelligence engine. Signal-emitted embed/rerank, hybrid recall, RRD classifier.

layout.crates/: workspace members (rro-core, connxism [fjall], embedder, reranker, recall, rrd, classifier, connectome, connectors, rro-net, rro-ql, rro-client, rro-engine, model-registry)

capability_tools.cargo-outdated: 0.19.0 — dep currency (all deps confirmed up to date)
capability_tools.cargo-audit: 0.22.2 — RustSec CVE scan (0 vulns; paste unmaintained, documented)
capability_tools.cargo-machete: 0.9.2 — unused-dep finder (flagged serde/tracing — review for macro/derive false-positives)
capability_tools.sccache: 0.16.0 — compile cache (wired as rustc-wrapper; caches non-incremental deps/release/CI; PROVEN with a cache hit)
capability_tools.rust-analyzer: 1.97.1 — LSP; installed via `rustup component add rust-analyzer` (was a dead rustup proxy). ACTIVATES ON CLAUDE CODE RESTART (plugin exhausted retries this session on the pre-fix crashes).

install_all: cargo binstall -y cargo-outdated cargo-audit cargo-deny cargo-nextest cargo-machete sccache && rustup component add rust-analyzer
